title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at More Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at More Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with More Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
